name: Monte Sano
content: Monte Sano is the large hill located next to Huntsville, which is both a state park and a residential neighborhood located at the top of the hill. The state park makes sense. The residential neighborhood confuses me, although I know some nice people that live up there. Monte Sano is a nice place to go hiking or for a bike ride. If you want the locals to look at you funny, you can even bike up the mountain like I used to do. For some reason in Alabama, “going for a bike ride” means “using my car to go somewhere and then biking around for a bit before driving back” For the Alabamans out there, the reason this is confusing is because a bike is already a mode of transportation, so it is silly to use your car as a prerequisite activity to biking when you could just bike to where you want to bike..
